consumer_instructions: Work items where status=='open'. For each: source a replacement matching product_intent, browser-verify it is live + In Stock + correct product (space Amazon requests 5-10s apart), then write the proposed new destination into resolution.proposed_destination and set status='proposed'. Do NOT edit affiliates.json or deploy — Jeff reviews and pushes. Reconcile against affiliate-governance.json and lifecycle.json before proposing (a slug may already be owned/retired there). If no good replacement exists, set status='retire-recommended' with a reason.

items.current_resolves_to: WILSON Traditional Soccer Ball, Size 4, Black/White — 'Currently unavailable. We don't know when or if this item will be back in stock.'

resolution.product_title: Champion Sports Retro Soccer Ball, Size 4, Black/White
resolution.why_fits: Classic black-and-white traditional design, official size/weight, explicitly 'ideal for players ages 8 to 12' — matches original intent and price point; Amazon's Choice, 4.4 stars, 3,400 ratings.
resolution.runner_up: B000067R1H (Franklin Sports Competition 100 Soccer Ball, Size 4 — $21.99, 4.5 stars, 7,756 ratings, In Stock, but pricier for a single inflated ball)
resolution.note: Named-product card on guides/soccer.md (ages 8-10 section) said 'Wilson Traditional soccer ball, size 4' and claimed 'same construction as the size-3.' Updated card copy to 'Champion Sports Retro soccer ball, size 4' with accurate description before approval, since the new product is a different brand. No corrections.ts entry needed — page copy now matches the destination, not a stale claim a returning reader needs a correction notice for.
